title: pholidia forrestii
intro: Pholidia forrestii, also known as the Forrest's Pholidia, is a plant species belonging to the family Rutaceae, commonly found in the tropical regions of Australia and New Guinea. The medicinal properties of Pholidia forrestii lie in its essential oils, particularly its citrus limonene and beta-pinene content, which exhibit antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential in reducing stress, improving respiratory issues, and boosting the immune system. Pholidia forrestii is often prepared as a tea or infused oil for its herbal benefits, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
